description: Add comprehensive testing infrastructure with Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for E2E and visual regression, and GitHub Actions CI pipeline.

userStories.title: Vitest Setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Vitest configured for unit and integration tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Run: npm install -D vitest @vitejs/plugin-react jsdom @testing-library/react @testing-library/jest-dom
Create vitest.config.ts with jsdom environment, path aliases matching tsconfig (@/* -> src/*)
Add 'test' script to package.json: vitest
Add 'test:coverage' script: vitest --coverage
Create src/__tests__/setup.ts importing @testing-library/jest-dom
Verify: npm run test runs without errors

userStories.title: Playwright Setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Playwright configured for E2E and visual regression tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Run: npm install -D @playwright/test
Run: npx playwright install chromium
Create playwright.config.ts: baseURL http://localhost:7000, screenshot on failure, single chromium project
Add 'e2e' script to package.json: playwright test
Add 'e2e:ui' script: playwright test --ui
Create e2e/ directory
Verify: npm run e2e runs (passes with no tests)

userStories.title: Test Database Setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an isolated test database so tests don't affect development data.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .env.test with TEST_DATABASE_URL pointing to separate database
For local: use same Railway DB with different schema, or document Docker postgres setup
Create scripts/setup-test-db.sh that sets DATABASE_URL from .env.test and runs prisma db push
Update package.json: add 'test:setup' script that runs setup-test-db.sh
Add .env.test to .gitignore (contains credentials)
Create .env.test.example with placeholder values
Verify: scripts/setup-test-db.sh completes without error

userStories.title: Mock Email Service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need email sending mocked during tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/__mocks__/email.ts
Export mock resend object with emails.send that stores to in-memory array
Export getSentEmails(): returns all sent emails
Export clearSentEmails(): clears the array
Export EMAIL_FROM constant (same as real)
Verify: File exports compile without errors (npm run build)

userStories.title: Auth Unit Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need unit tests for password hashing and session utilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/__tests__/auth.test.ts
Test: hashPassword returns string longer than input
Test: hashPassword returns different hash for same input (salt)
Test: verifyPassword returns true for correct password
Test: verifyPassword returns false for wrong password
Test: generateSessionToken returns 64-character hex string
Verify: npm run test passes

userStories.title: E2E Homepage Test
userStories.description: As a developer, I need E2E tests verifying the homepage loads correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Create e2e/homepage.spec.ts
Test: Page has title containing 'Mateo'
Test: Heading 'Mateo The Great' is visible
Test: YouTube iframe exists on page
Test: Newsletter email input is visible
Test: Navigation contains Home, Exclusive, Sign In links
Test: Footer contains 'MTG Intellectual Reserve'
Verify: npm run e2e passes (start dev server first)

userStories.title: E2E Signup Flow Test
userStories.description: As a developer, I need E2E tests for the complete signup user journey.
acceptanceCriteria: Create e2e/auth-signup.spec.ts
Test: Can navigate from homepage to /signup via Sign In link then Sign Up link
Test: Form shows email, password, confirm password fields
Test: Submitting mismatched passwords shows error
Test: Submitting valid form with unique email (use timestamp) redirects to /signin
Test: Success message displayed after signup
Verify: npm run e2e passes

userStories.title: E2E Signin Flow Test
userStories.description: As a developer, I need E2E tests for signin and session flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Create e2e/auth-signin.spec.ts
Test: /signin page shows demo credentials prefilled
Test: Submitting demo credentials redirects to /account
Test: /account page displays user email
Test: Sign out button exists and clicking redirects to homepage
Test: After sign out, /account redirects to /signin
Verify: npm run e2e passes

userStories.title: E2E Protected Routes Test
userStories.description: As a developer, I need E2E tests verifying auth protection.
acceptanceCriteria: Create e2e/protected-routes.spec.ts
Test: Unauthenticated GET /account redirects to /signin
Test: Unauthenticated GET /exclusive shows teaser, not full content
Test: After signin, /account is accessible
Test: After signin, /exclusive shows content cards
Test: Can click through to /exclusive/[slug] and see article content
Verify: npm run e2e passes

userStories.title: Visual Regression - Homepage
userStories.description: As a developer, I need visual snapshot tests for homepage.
acceptanceCriteria: Create e2e/visual/homepage.spec.ts
Set viewport to 1280x720 before tests
Test: Take full-page screenshot, compare to baseline
Test: Take screenshot of hero section (first viewport)
Store baseline in e2e/screenshots/homepage/ directory
Configure toHaveScreenshot with maxDiffPixelRatio: 0.01
Verify: npm run e2e passes and creates screenshots
Commit baseline screenshots to git

userStories.title: Visual Regression - Auth Pages
userStories.description: As a developer, I need visual snapshots for auth pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Create e2e/visual/auth.spec.ts
Set viewport to 1280x720
Test: Screenshot /signin page
Test: Screenshot /signup page
Test: Screenshot /forgot-password page
Test: Screenshot /account page (after logging in with demo creds)
Store baselines in e2e/screenshots/auth/
Verify: npm run e2e passes
Commit baseline screenshots to git

userStories.title: GitHub Actions - Test Workflow
userStories.description: As a developer, I need CI that runs tests on every push and PR.
acceptanceCriteria: Create .github/workflows/test.yml
Trigger on: push to main and ralph/* branches, pull_request to main
Use ubuntu-latest runner
Setup Node.js 20
Cache node_modules with actions/cache
Run: npm ci
Run: npm run lint
Run: npm run build
Run: npm run test (Vitest)
Setup PostgreSQL service container for E2E tests
Run: npx playwright install chromium --with-deps
Run: npm run e2e
Upload playwright-report as artifact on failure
Verify: Push triggers workflow in GitHub Actions tab

userStories.title: Playwright CI Configuration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Playwright configured to work in CI environment.
acceptanceCriteria: Update playwright.config.ts: detect CI via process.env.CI
In CI: disable retries, use single worker
In CI: start webServer with 'npm run dev' command, wait for localhost:7000
Set webServer.reuseExistingServer to !process.env.CI
Add reporter: CI uses 'github' reporter, local uses 'html'
Verify: npm run e2e works both locally and in GitHub Actions

userStories.title: CI Environment Variables
userStories.description: As a developer, I need environment variables configured for CI tests.
acceptanceCriteria: Document required GitHub Secrets in README: DATABASE_URL, RESEND_API_KEY, SESSION_SECRET
Update .github/workflows/test.yml to use secrets as env vars
For RESEND_API_KEY in tests: use dummy value (emails are mocked)
For DATABASE_URL: use PostgreSQL service container connection string
Set NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL to http://localhost:7000
Verify: CI workflow has access to all required env vars

userStories.title: Branch Protection Rules
userStories.description: As a developer, I need main branch protected so only passing CI can merge.
acceptanceCriteria: Document branch protection setup in README
Instructions: Go to GitHub repo Settings > Branches > Add rule
Rule: Require status checks (test workflow) before merging
Rule: Require branches to be up to date
Note: Railway auto-deploys from main, so protection ensures only tested code deploys
Verify: Document is clear and actionable

nonGoals: No mobile device testing (desktop Chromium only)
